content:
The 10% text sign-up code only works for these items: http://attn.tv/lg/offerdetails.html

Vacuums:
A905RM
A907GMS

PL5
PL5W

Disclaimer:
Extra 10% off select vacuums, PuriCare air purifiers, TONE Free headphones and XBOOM Go wireless speakers is off the pre-tax sale price on LG.com only. Offer valid for one-time use only within 30 days of code being sent. To receive the additional 10% off savings, promotion code must be entered at online checkout and will be applied to eligible products only. If any of the qualifying items are removed from the cart, canceled or returned, the promotional savings will be void. Availability, prices and terms of offer are subject to change without notice. No adjustments to prior purchases and non-redeemable for cash.
Qualifying Vacuums: A905RM, A907GMS, A927KGMS, A927KVMS, A908VMR, A929KVM, R975GM1
Qualifying PuriCare Air Purifiers: AS560DWR0, AS330DWR0, AP151MBA1, AP151MWA1
Qualifying TONE Free headphones: HBS-FN6.ACUSBKI, HBS-FN6.ACUSWHI, HBS-FN5W.ACUSBKI, HBS-FN5W.ACUSWHI, HBS-FN4.ACUSBKI, HBS-FN4.ACUSWHI, TONE-FP8.AUSACLK, TONE-FP9.AUSACLK, TONE-FP5.AUSACLK
Qualifying LG Styler: S3MFBN, S3RFBN, S3WFBN, S5MSB, S3CW
Qualifying XBOOM Go Wireless Speakers: PL2, PL5, PL5W

send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS using the "Escalation template"
templates: For 10% off welcome code issues use temp 'Follow up 1', then 'Follow up 2' after confirming the item is excluded from promos
For fridge recommendations use FRR shortcut
For service-related issues/scheduled repair service appointments use SRI shortcut
For cxs looking for replacement parts/accessories from an affiliate Parts Distributor use RPA shortcut
If a cx has an inquiry for finding the serial number/model number of an item:
➜ If it's a TV, use mnt shortcut
➜ If it's another product, use mna shortcut
dos_and_donts: If it's a new conversation and we didn't introduce ourselves in the automated message, start your message with: "This is Jordan at LG."
